TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: gaga na utux Snlitan c'rxan gaga na utux Snlitan hiya ga mra' yow ro mlahang gaga na mluyak, yow na Mgaga, ro yow na mtiri' paris. yani ci khmey hi ga cn'ruw naha utux Snlitan, ana uy ga piyux tipik na lhuyan utux Snlitan ga mso'un kbaley utux tyaba na utux Snlitan uy. mrhow na gaga utux Snlitan kwe, siga maki knba'an, myuhum, kba' mlahang gaga, skura yow na tanux ga iwan utux gaga na Snlitan. mrhow utux gaga Snlitan ga gmluw gaga ro gmleng utux gaga Snlitan naha, kwara yow khangan naha ga yow na gaga mluyak, yow na Mgaga, yow na tiri' paris, ro p'agal myasa knayal ke cyoli ro, sbaley yow, ro rmow sbaley yow. Bnrwan qa galan cpung śĪüśėéśłÖYawi‚ÄßNomin, ,
S.PHON: …£a…£a na utux s~…ēnlitan ¶~ ® Ērxan …£a…£a na utux s~…ēnlitan ńßija …£a mra Ē jow ro mlańßaŇč …£a…£a na mlujak, jow na m…£a…£a, ro jow na mtiri Ē paris~…ē. jani ¶~ ®i kńßmej ńßi …£a ¶~ ®n Ēruw nańßa utux s~…ēnlitan, ana uj …£a pijux tipik na lńßujan utux s~…ēnlitan …£a ms~…ēo Ēun kő≤alej utux tjaő≤a na utux s~…ēnlitan uj. mrńßow na …£a…£a utux s~…ēnlitan kwe, s~…ēi…£a maki knő≤a Ēan, mjuńßum, kő≤a Ē mlańßaŇč …£a…£a, s~…ēkura jow na tanux …£a iwan utux …£a…£a na s~…ēnlitan. mrńßow utux …£a…£a s~…ēnlitan …£a …£mluw …£a…£a ro …£mleŇč utux …£a…£a s~…ēnlitan nańßa, kwara jow kńßaŇčan nańßa …£a jow na …£a…£a mlujak, jow na m…£a…£a, jow na tiri Ē paris~…ē, ro p Ēa…£al mjas~…ēa knajal ke ¶~ ®joli ro, s~…ēő≤alej jow, ro rmow s~…ēő≤alej jow. ő≤nrwan qa …£alan ¶~ ®puŇč ***jawi*nomin, ,
S.FORM: gaga na utux Snlitan c'rxan gaga na utux Snlitan hiya ga mra' yow ro mlahang gaga na mluyak, yow na Mgaga, ro yow na mtiri' paris. yani ci khmey hi ga cn'ruw naha utux Snlitan, ana uy ga piyux tipik na lhuyan utux Snlitan ga mso'un kbaley utux tyaba na utux Snlitan uy. mrhow na gaga utux Snlitan kwe, siga maki knba'an, myuhum, kba' mlahang gaga, skura yow na tanux ga iwan utux gaga na Snlitan. mrhow utux gaga Snlitan ga gmluw gaga ro gmleng utux gaga Snlitan naha, kwara yow khangan naha ga yow na gaga mluyak, yow na Mgaga, yow na tiri' paris, ro p'agal myasa knayal ke cyoli ro, sbaley yow, ro rmow sbaley yow. Bnrwan qa galan cpung śĪüśėéśłÖYawi‚ÄßNomin, ,
